rule_description: No household-core estimate may be computed with missing or zero final weights
Eligible denominator must be positive before publishing an estimate
Published proportions must lie in [0,1] before scaling to percentages
Every published household estimate must retain source_program and source_year
Rows with exception_flag=1 must be reviewed before publication
Learning layers are imported source-native and must not be recomputed from household files
Admin and population layers must be clearly labeled as reference/integration layers
OECD DAC/CRS may support SCOPE-style thematic publication but not household row-level harmonization
